title: Lycopodioides rossii
taxonomy: Lycopodioides rossii is classified as a species of club moss within the family Lycopodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Lycopodioides, which is a group of plants closely related to the more widely distributed Lycopodium. Lycopodioides rossii is a type of vascular plant, characterized by its distinctive club-like shape and needle-like leaves. This species is typically found in damp, shaded areas and is native to the island of Ross in Antarctica. As part of the Lycopodiaceae family, it is also known as a member of the order Lycopodiales.
